rulings.Case Title: 108 ALBION STREET LLC VS. DAWN HAYES ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 4, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT DAWN HAYES MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER. rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED OWNER LLC VS. DELVIN REED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Reclassify Complaint As A Case Of Limited Jurisdiction; Moton To Reclassify Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Adrienne Mendle; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 4, 2019 line 8 (Part 2 of 2). DEFENDANT DELVIN REED Notice Of Motion To Reclassify Complaint As A Case Of Limited Jurisdiction; Moton To Reclassify Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Adrienne Mendle; Proof Of Service is DENIED. Moving party failed to show that the recovery in this action will necessarily be below the jurisdictional limit. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED OWNER LLC VS. DELVIN REED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 4, 2019 line 8 (Part 1 of 2). DEFENDANT DELVIN REED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint is not uncertain. The prayer for damages is clear and the jurisdictional designation is clearly stated. There is no conflict, as suggested, between the two rendering the Complaint unintelligible. =(501/REQ)
